title: gate-verdict
description: Written by a gate review agent after evaluating a phase's outputs. One file per attempt, never overwritten. Stored in gate-verdicts/ directory.

phase.description: Phase identifier being reviewed, e.g. phase-2

attempt.description: Attempt number for this phase; increments on each retry

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the gate verdict was written

agent.description: Identifier of the gate agent that produced this verdict, e.g. code-review-agent

verdict.description: Gate outcome: pass advances the phase; fail triggers versioned retry

confidence.description: Confidence score 0–100. Findings with confidence below threshold do not trigger rollbacks.

findings.description: List of issues found during the gate review. Empty array on pass.

severity.description: critical: blocks pass; warning: noted but may not block; info: informational only

location.description: File path, function, or loop identifier where the issue was found

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting the finding, e.g. file path, line number, value observed

loops_to_revert.description: Loop identifiers whose outputs are invalid and must be re-executed on retry. Empty array on pass.

failure_notes.description: Actionable constraints for the retry attempt. Injected into new loop files as do_not_repeat. Empty array on pass.
